台股與集中市場 ·

〈台股風向球〉短線修正壓力升溫 520輝達財報決定行情續航力 | 鉅亨網 - 台股新聞Taiwan stocks: pullback pressure rises; Nvidia earnings to test rally staying power

https://news.cnyes.com/news/id/6461175

美股上周五回檔，台股周跌431點，周K留逾1200點上影線，外資期貨淨空單仍逾5萬口。交易員認為，技術面過熱、獲利了結升溫與外資避險未退，短線加權指數易跌難漲；5月20日輝達財報將牽動AI多頭能否延續攻勢。

交易員指出，外資期貨淨空單雖由前週54,530口降至5月15日50,963口，仍處避險高峰；集中市場週賣超逾908億元，顯示大盤創高後避險情緒偏濃。

觀察外資上週主要賣超，以主動統一升級50（00403A-TW）約160萬張居首，元大台灣50（0050-TW）與主動統一台股增長（00981A-TW）均逾12萬張；中鋼（2002-TW）遭賣逾9萬張，主動群益科技創新（00992A-TW）逾8萬張，彰銀（2801-TW）與主動復華未來50（00991A-TW）均逾7.4萬張，臺企銀（2834-TW）達6萬張，反映外資與積極買進主動式ETF的散戶呈對作格局。

投信則展現本土資金力道，單週買超約898億元，為2024年3月下旬以來最大；其中買超聯電（2303-TW）逾7.4萬張、華邦電（2334-TW）6萬張、台積電（2330-TW）2.3萬張，文曄（3036-TW）與國巨（2327-TW）均逾2萬張，南亞科（2408-TW）1.3萬張、台表科（6278-TW）亦達1萬張。

本週焦點為輝達20日財報；惟輝達股價日K連7紅後，週五回檔4.4%。交易員提醒，須留意輝達股價後續回檔壓力，恐牽動市場對AI題材熱度的修正。

永豐投顧指出，上週台股多次開高走低、未見有效突破，始終未能站穩42,000點之上；週五開高後跌逾千點，收在週線下方，融券空單續增，乖離過大的台股修正機率升高；若週一續跌，向下交叉將告成立，技術面可能仍需整理甚至回檔。

U.S. stocks pulled back last Friday; Taiwan’s benchmark fell 431 points for the week and left an upper shadow of more than 1,200 points on the weekly chart, while foreign investors’ net short futures positions stayed above 50,000 contracts. Traders say overheated technicals, heavier profit-taking, and lingering foreign hedging make the weighted index prone to fall rather than rise near term; Nvidia’s May 20 earnings will shape whether the AI-led rally can keep advancing.

Traders note foreign net short futures eased from 54,530 contracts the prior week to 50,963 on May 15 but remain near hedging highs; net selling on the centralized market exceeded NT$90.8 billion for the week, signaling elevated caution after the index hit new highs.

Among foreign investors’ main sells last week, Active Uni-President Upgrade 50 (00403A-TW) led at roughly 1.6 million shares; Yuanta Taiwan 50 (0050-TW) and Active Uni-President Taiwan Growth (00981A-TW) each topped 120,000 shares; China Steel (2002-TW) saw sales above 90,000; Active Capital Securities Tek Innovation (00992A-TW) above 80,000; Chang Hwa Commercial Bank (2801-TW) and Active Fuh Hwa Future 50 (00991A-TW) each exceeded 74,000; Taiwan Business Bank (2834-TW) reached 60,000—reflecting foreign positioning against retail flows aggressively buying active ETFs.

Domestic funds showed muscle via investment trusts with weekly net buying of about NT$89.8 billion, the largest since late March 2024; purchases included United Microelectronics (2303-TW) above 74,000 shares, Winbond (2334-TW) 60,000, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. (2330-TW) 23,000, WT Microelectronics (3036-TW) and Yageo (2327-TW) each over 20,000, Nanya Technology (2408-TW) 13,000, and TPK Holding (6278-TW) also 10,000.

This week’s headline is Nvidia’s May 20 earnings; after seven straight up days on the daily chart, the stock slipped 4.4% Friday. Traders warn follow-on pullback pressure in Nvidia could spill over into a cooler reassessment of AI enthusiasm across the market.

SinoPac Investment Advisory said Taiwan stocks repeatedly opened higher and faded last week without a clean breakout and never held firmly above 42,000; Friday’s gap-up gave way to a drop of more than 1,000 points and a close below the weekly line, while margin short interest rose—raising the odds of a correction after stretched deviations; another down session Monday would confirm a bearish cross, implying further consolidation or pullback on the charts.
